title: Split 80/10/10 + Hermes chat template JSONL.gz
acceptance_criteria: Files are valid gzipped JSONL with role/content structure
Hermes chat template: system prompt + user input + assistant output
completion_summary: Split deterministically shuffles records (configurable seed) and partitions 80/10/10. Write serialises to gzipped Hermes JSONL (system+user+assistant messages per line). WriteSplits handles full flow. Small-N boundary clamping ensures correctness at edges. 7 tests pass.
